reviews.review_description: I’m soo happy this game came onto quest because I really wanted to play it. It was really good and kind of funny as well. Also can you make a quest 3 update with better graphics and frame rates.

The jumping mechanics are awful, and the only solution i found was a developer response on steam that advised to teleport.

The game gas a lot of bugs and weird stuff and the hugh jump is not understandable.

In my opinion do not buy, unless the developer fixes the jumps. I am requesting a refund rn

developer_response.body:
Hello! a patch is coming, should improve the climbing too,

to climb without the teleport you have to just press forward on a ledge, should auto climb automatically

reviews.review_description: This game is fun unless it has to deal with jumping. The jumping mechanics are horrible and it makes the game just not enjoyable.

Seems like a fun concept but the game itself is very poorly put together. Little to no explanation as to what to do or why the game exists. Do all the mini missions to stop the guys beer from tipping over. It's just a first gen VR game..id hope it would have had some more polish by now
one of the best first person puzzles on the store! levels are crazy
Why can't I watch it when I die? It closes a sample quickly

developer_response.body: we'll add an option for that :)

reviews.review_description: The game is really weird but fun, will try to finish soon!

bro pls i spent my allowings to get this game and cant get trough most of the levels because the climb button on quest three is horibble like instead of that janky joystick you move it so you can climb why dont you do to press the button to jump 2 times so you can climb or use the hands to climb it it was very dificult at the start to climb as the tutorial in level 2 doesnt really show you how to even climb proprely and the crouch and the other levels o they are so soo janky plus there is a bug where when you try to jump from another platform to the other from the first platform you kinda climb it and tou cant do the job proprely at the gold cave thingy level whot the spikes at the last the last section whit the jumps i had to use teleport just to get troigh there like pls fix the support for quest3 and 2 3s

developer_response.body: Hello! try the teleport mode in case could help!

reviews.review_description: one of the strangest puzzles games on quest store
It's trash. Rotating camera is a snap option, tried to change it but nothing worked. In game it's very often to be stuck in terms of camera and it was imposible to rotate it.

developer_response.body:
hello sorry to hear! What you needed for rotation?

A patch is coming soon, maybe try the teleport mode to help you out

reviews.review_description: Had fun on the original game, now in vr even better

reviews.review_title: I Love this game! One small problem tho.
reviews.review_description: This game is great! Some of the mechanics like climbing are kinda janky, but it’s still fun to solve the puzzles! But, one small issue. About maybe 75% of the way through the game, in the Nuclear level, it’s actually unplayable, as in the floor, is nonexistent, so there is no possible way of clearing it. I’ve tried many times and I’ve kept failing though the floor on that specific level and, it’s really upsetting not being able to play the rest of the game. But overall, this game is great besides the bug!

developer_response.body: Hello and sorry for the bug! The patch is coming next week to fix this and many other problems, stay tuned! PS: now the bug is fixed!

reviews.review_title: This Game Is Still in Early Access
reviews.review_description:
This game has far too many issues that need fixing. The development team really needs to put more thought and effort into VR game design. Things that might be overlooked in PC or video games become glaring flaws in VR. This is because every element—motions, modeling, effects, and all—is magnified and exposed raw to the player.

This game is still far from being a commercial product. There are simply too many points to criticize: awkward, gliding character motions, imprecise physics engines, and poorly designed interactive objects, just to name a few. Even for an episodic game, the transitions between scenes are incredibly unnatural. When you clear a stage, there's absolutely no sense of accomplishment. It just cuts abruptly to a black screen, and that's it.

If this game is left unaddressed, it will simply fade away. Please don't abandon the game IP you've painstakingly cultivated. It needs more attention. I'm leaving such a lengthy review because I believe this game has potential. You've established a decent framework; now it's time to polish it into something truly great.

If you update this game to be even better, I'll change this review to 5 stars.

Formerly known as Suicide Guy on PSVR1, The Guy VR Deluxe brings back the absurd fun with an original twist: your mission is to wake yourself up by any means necessary to save your beloved beer from falling. Each level is a quirky dream packed with hilarious puzzles, bizarre interactions, and unexpected surprises. The game is full of charm, creative scenarios, and solid VR execution. A refreshing and unconventional experience — perfect if you’re looking for something offbeat and entertaining!
While the concept is original it is not ready to be released.  Dev- create a discord and get other devs to help you out.

developer_response.body: Hello! Do you have other feedback? in case you can join our Discord! We're still getting feedback for the next update https://discord.com/invite/chubbypixel

reviews.review_description: I enjoyed this on psvr2 so to be able to play without a wire is a bonus, graphics are very good for quest, gameplay is good and I'm sure with updates it will only get better
The most absurd VR experience I’ve had, and I mean that as a compliment.
I played this game on my Nintendo switch and now I have it on vr amazing!
